pkgmetadata.longdescription: Yet another stripped down fork of boost-ext ut2 (! not ut !). ut2 is a library for testing using `constexpr` extensively in comparison to boost-ext/ut. Original ut2 is at https://github.com/boost-ext/ut2 . On why the glaze developers chose to use their fork: https://github.com/stephenberry/glaze/discussions/1653
